negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negative.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for negative.tptp
3. orchestra(vienna_music_society) [input(axiom)]
4. leads(vienna_music_society,beethoven) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1] : ((orchestra(X0) & leads(X0,X1)) => conductor(X1)) [input(axiom)]
7. conductor(beethoven) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~conductor(beethoven) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~conductor(beethoven) [flattening 8]
12. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X1) | (~orchestra(X0) | ~leads(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 5]
13. ! [X0,X1] : (conductor(X1) | ~orchestra(X0) | ~leads(X0,X1)) [flattening 12]
14. orchestra(vienna_music_society) [cnf transformation 3]
15. leads(vienna_music_society,beethoven) [cnf transformation 4]
16. ~leads(X0,X1) | ~orchestra(X0) | conductor(X1) [cnf transformation 13]
20. ~conductor(beethoven) [cnf transformation 9]
21. ~orchestra(vienna_music_society) | conductor(beethoven) [resolution 16,15]
22. conductor(beethoven) [forward subsumption resolution 21,14]
23. $false [forward subsumption resolution 22,20]
% SZS output end Proof for negative.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
